name: Chongqing Zaisheng Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Chongqing Zaisheng Technology Co., Ltd. researches, manufactures, and markets glass microfiber products for purification and energy-saving markets in China. It offers glass microfiber filter media, fiber glass vacuum insulation panel core materials, composite fiberglass filter papers, glass microfibers, AGM separators, glass microfiber air-laid mats, and glassfiber cryogenic insulation materials. The company also provides air-laid cotton blankets and inorganic spraying fiberglass products, as well as glass fiber filter paper derivative services. Chongqing Zaisheng Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Chongqing, China.
